releaseNotes: Small safe test release for the hidden silent restart-to-update installer flow.
No feature, product, supplier, order, report, data, UI, branding, or cloud-sync changes are included.
Only app version/update metadata is refreshed so an older installed Inventra can detect, prepare, silently install, and reopen this newer version.
Keeps GitHub Releases as the active update host for now while keeping Cloudflare R2, Bunny, S3, Supabase Pro, or a custom CDN possible later.
Keeps parallel byte-range download, streaming fallback, SHA-256 verification support, cached metadata, auto SHA release JSON generation, and hidden silent update install behavior.
